intro.title: Crafting Outdoor Spaces With Purpose and Precision
intro.lead: AV1-Company is a premium landscaping and outdoor design studio based in Peja, Kosovo. For over 15 years, we've helped homeowners and businesses across the country turn ordinary outdoor spaces into lasting works of art — combining thoughtful design, skilled craftsmanship and premium materials in every project we take on.

story.title: How We Got Here
paragraphs: AV1-Company began with a simple belief: that the spaces around a home deserve just as much care and attention as the home itself. What started as a small team of professionals in Peja has grown into a trusted company for yards, fences, staircases, stone fountains and high-quality outdoor construction.

Over the years we have completed more than 100 successful projects. Every project has helped us gain more experience, improve the quality of our work, and build trust with our clients. Our commitment to quality and detail remains our priority in every project we take on.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To design and build outdoor spaces that elevate everyday life — blending premium materials, skilled craftsmanship and thoughtful design into landscapes that feel as good to live in as they look.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: Our vision is for every client to remain satisfied with our work, and for AV1-Company to be recognized as the most trusted name for outdoor construction and landscaping in Peja and beyond.

values.title: Our Values
values.subtitle: The principles that guide every project, from the first sketch to the final walkthrough.

items.title: Quality Craftsmanship
items.description: We hold every detail to the same premium standard, from material selection to final finish.

items.title: Integrity
items.description: Honest pricing, clear timelines and transparent communication from quote to completion.

items.title: Innovation
items.description: We stay current with design trends and techniques to bring fresh ideas to every space.

items.title: Sustainability
items.description: We choose durable, responsibly sourced materials that stand the test of time.
